boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the privacy operator execute the requested data release, deletion, transfer, or sharing action? Focus: customer portability file released to verified account owner.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close boundary

final_answer: The source record set does not close the exact release boundary. SRC-6D0CF7E4844F-CTL explicitly states the required account ownership and portability format approval match is missing, stale, mismatched, or expired. SRC-6D0CF7E4844F-POL requires current source closure before execution, and SRC-6D0CF7E4844F-BND prohibits release to unverified channels. Tone, urgency, or support context cannot authorize release.
open_blockers: account ownership and portability format approval match
